intent_head: Who has the next upcoming birthday? If there is a tie on the date, include every matching person. Answer with exact names only, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS files before entering folders, and used canonical cast record for identity/birthday.
function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-02. Birthday search across cast records shows the next month-day after 03-02 is 04-04, and tie-check search for 04-04 matched only Petra's canonical cast record. Therefore the next upcoming birthday belongs solely to Petra Novak.
